name: TitanCorePrompts
description: Curated system and helper prompts provided by TitanCore. Used by the orchestrator agent, RAG pipeline, and tool result formatting.

prompts.name: Titan Default System Prompt
prompts.description: Default system prompt injected into every TitanCore orchestrator conversation. Sets assistant persona, safety boundaries, and output format guidelines.

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: The authenticated user's company name for personalisation.

prompts.usage: Injected automatically as the first message (role: system) in every orchestrator chat request.

prompts.name: Titan RAG Context Injection
prompts.description: Wraps retrieved document chunks into a structured context block that is prepended to the user's message before LLM completion.

variables.name: retrieved_chunks
variables.description: Array of retrieved document chunks with text and source metadata.

variables.name: query
variables.description: The original user query being answered.

prompts.usage: Applied by AIOrchestratorPipeline after the retrieval stage, before tool execution.

prompts.name: Titan Tool Result Formatter
prompts.description: Formats raw tool execution results into a human-readable, citation-aware response for the end user.

variables.name: tool_name
variables.description: The name of the tool that was executed.

variables.name: tool_result
variables.description: The raw result array returned by the tool handler.

variables.name: citations
variables.description: Optional citation objects resolved from retrieved documents.

prompts.usage: Applied by AIOrchestratorPipeline after the tool execution stage to format the final user-facing response.
